task_completion.description: Enroll patient 'CV-106' with the correct Date of Birth and Sex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a subject matrix or subject details page in OpenClinica showing Subject ID 'CV-106', Date of Birth '1965-08-22' (or 22-Aug-1965), and Sex 'Male'.

task_completion.description: Schedule a 'Baseline Encounter' study event with the correct Encounter Date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the subject matrix or event details page showing a 'Baseline Encounter' scheduled for patient 'CV-106' on the date '2024-05-14' (or 14-May-2024).

task_completion.description: Upload the CRF template and assign it to the 'Baseline Encounter' event definition.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Build Study' or 'Event Definitions' page showing the uploaded CRF assigned to the 'Baseline Encounter' event, or the CRF appearing as an option to enter data for the 'Baseline Encounter' event in the subject matrix.

task_completion.description: Transcribe Heart Rate, Systolic Blood Pressure, and Diastolic Blood Pressure into the CRF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the data entry screen for the CRF showing Heart Rate as 82, Systolic Blood Pressure as 145, and Diastolic Blood Pressure as 92.

task_completion.description: Record converted Height and Weight as a Discrepancy Note (Annotation) on the Heart Rate field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Discrepancy Note popup, thread, or flag icon next to the Heart Rate field showing the exact text 'Height: 177.8 cm, Weight: 88.5 kg' and the type set to 'Annotation'.
Look for the CRF status in the subject matrix showing a green checkmark or 'completed' status, or the 'Mark CRF Complete' checkbox being checked on the data entry screen.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenClinica web interface in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is using a web browser to navigate and interact with OpenClinica, rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual OpenClinica forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is typing the values into the OpenClinica web forms, not just writing them in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use SQL commands to bypass the web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the terminal is not used to execute SQL queries (e.g., via psql) to directly insert data into the OpenClinica database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient 'CV-106' should be enrolled with DOB '1965-08-22' and Sex 'Male'. The 'Baseline Encounter' event date is '2024-05-14'. The transcribed vitals must be Heart Rate: 82, Systolic BP: 145, Diastolic BP: 92. The Discrepancy Note on the Heart Rate field must be exactly 'Height: 177.8 cm, Weight: 88.5 kg'.
